service_metadata.language_rationale: Canonical native language of this service in GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo (hipstershop), pinned constant across all models/reps for cross-language comparability (FR-31).

context.language_rationale: Canonical native language of this service in GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo (hipstershop), pinned constant across all models/reps for cross-language comparability (FR-31).

config.task_description: Implement the **CurrencyService** gRPC service for the Online Boutique microservices demo, in **nodejs** (its canonical native language). Converts money between currencies using ECB rates. Highest-QPS service. Implement exactly the RPCs defined for CurrencyService in the embedded demo.proto contract: GetSupportedCurrencies, Convert. Wire up a gRPC server that serves these RPCs. Do not implement any other service from the proto.
